title: Jumbo Plasters (10 Cm X 5cm) - Ultimate Healing & Protection - Perfect for Protection & Swift Healing - Pack of 20
features: EXTRA LARGE COVERAGE: Jumbo Plasters (10cm x 5cm) provide ultimate healing and protection for larger cuts, scrapes, and wounds, ensuring you stay covered and comfortable at all times.
DURABLE MATERIAL: Our high-quality, long-lasting adhesive material is built to withstand daily wear and tear, keeping your wound securely protected and allowing for a swift healing process.
WASHABLE & REUSABLE: These plasters are designed to be easily washed and air-dried, ensuring that you can reuse them multiple times - a cost-effective and eco-friendly solution
PERFECT FOR SWIFT HEALING: Our Jumbo Plasters promote optimal protection and accelerated healing by preventing dirt and bacteria from entering the wound, ensuring a swift healing process.
PACK OF 20: With 20 plasters in each pack, you'll always have plenty on hand for any unexpected injuries. Order now and experience top-notch protection and healing for your wounds.
description: Introducing Jumbo Plasters, the superior solution for those large cuts and gashes. Measuring an impressive 10 centimeters by 5 centimeters, these are not your average bandages. With unrivaled adhesive strength and a non-stick pad, they provide ultimate protection, ensuring your wound stays clean and the healing process is accelerated. Designed for heavy-duty demands, Jumbo Plasters are ideal for use in workplaces, households, and travel kits. Experience immediate relief and swift recovery with Jumbo Plasters – your answer to peace of mind in every size emergency.
